description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image and runs `bundle install` in a global before_script. Set the variable JEKYLL_ENV to production. Define two stages, test and deploy. In the test stage add a `test` job that executes `bundle exec jekyll build -d test`, saves the `test` directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except master. In the deploy stage add a `pages` job that runs `bundle exec jekyll build -d public`, publishes the `public` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
